allow: Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 "flux suspend helmrelease artifactory-oss -n artifactory && flux resume helmrelease artifactory-oss -n artifactory")
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 "kubectl get nodes -o wide && echo '---' && kubectl version --short 2>/dev/null || kubectl version")
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 "flux version 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && kubectl get helmrelease -A")
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 "kubectl get all -A --no-headers | grep -v 'kube-system\\|kube-public\\|kube-node-lease\\|flux-system' | head -60")
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 "flux get kustomizations -A && echo '---' && kubectl get pv")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,base64; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k+':', base64.b64decode\(v\).decode\(\)\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no cakers-worker-3.lab.local "sudo rm -rf /mnt/data/postgres-data/* && echo 'Wiped' && ls /mnt/data/postgres-data/")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no kubeadmin@cakers-worker-3.lab.local "sudo rm -rf /mnt/data/postgres-data/* && echo 'Wiped' && ls /mnt/data/postgres-data/")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1.lab.local 'flux reconcile source git flux-system -n flux-system && flux reconcile helmrelease artifactory-oss -n artifactory --with-source')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'flux get all -A 2>&1; echo "---PODS---"; kubectl get pods -n flux-system 2>&1; echo "---EVENTS---"; kubectl get events -n flux-system --sort-by=.lastTimestamp 2>&1 | tail -30')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== SSH Secret ==="; kubectl get secret flux-system -n flux-system -o jsonpath="{.type}" 2>&1; echo ""; echo "=== CoreDNS pods ==="; kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l k8s-app=kube-dns 2>&1; echo "=== CoreDNS logs \(last 20\) ==="; kubectl logs -n kube-system -l k8s-app=kube-dns --tail=20 2>&1; echo "=== DNS test from a pod ==="; kubectl run -n flux-system dns-test --image=busybox:1.28 --rm -it --restart=Never -- nslookup github.com 2>&1 || true')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== NetworkPolicies in flux-system ==="; kubectl get networkpolicy -n flux-system 2>&1; echo "=== source-controller logs ==="; kubectl logs -n flux-system deployment/source-controller --tail=30 2>&1; echo "=== GitRepository describe ==="; kubectl describe gitrepository flux-system -n flux-system 2>&1 | tail -30')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== allow-egress NetworkPolicy ==="; kubectl get networkpolicy allow-egress -n flux-system -o yaml 2>&1; echo "=== allow-scraping NetworkPolicy ==="; kubectl get networkpolicy allow-scraping -n flux-system -o yaml 2>&1')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== CNI in use ==="; kubectl get pods -n kube-system -o wide | grep -E "calico|cilium|flannel|weave|canal" 2>&1; echo "=== source-controller pod node ==="; kubectl get pod -n flux-system -l app=source-controller -o wide 2>&1; echo "=== Node status ==="; kubectl get nodes -o wide 2>&1')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== All kube-system pods ==="; kubectl get pods -n kube-system -o wide 2>&1; echo "=== Exec into source-controller - test DNS ==="; kubectl exec -n flux-system deployment/source-controller -- nslookup github.com 2>&1 || kubectl exec -n flux-system deployment/source-controller -- cat /etc/resolv.conf 2>&1')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== pod CIDR configured ==="; kubectl get node cakers-cp-1.lab.local -o jsonpath="{.spec.podCIDR}" 2>&1; echo ""; echo "=== kubeadm config ==="; kubectl get configmap kubeadm-config -n kube-system -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -A5 -E "podSubnet|networking|clusterNetwork" | head -20; echo "=== Any CNI config on disk ==="; ls /etc/cni/net.d/ 2>&1')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'kubectl get pods -n kube-flannel -o wide 2>&1; echo "---"; kubectl rollout status daemonset/kube-flannel-ds -n kube-flannel 2>&1')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== Flannel logs on worker-1 ==="; kubectl logs -n kube-flannel -l app=flannel --field-selector spec.nodeName=cakers-worker-1.lab.local --tail=20 2>&1')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-worker-1 'echo "=== Routes ==="; ip route show; echo "=== flannel.1 interface ==="; ip addr show flannel.1 2>/dev/null; echo "=== iptables FORWARD chain ==="; sudo iptables -L FORWARD -n --line-numbers | head -20')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'kubectl get daemonset kube-flannel-ds -n kube-flannel -o yaml')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'kubectl patch daemonset kube-flannel-ds -n kube-flannel --type=json -p '\\''[{"op": "add", "path": "/spec/template/spec/containers/0/args/-", "value": "--iface=enp0s8"}]'\\''')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'kubectl rollout status daemonset/kube-flannel-ds -n kube-flannel --timeout=120s')

Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'echo "=== Flannel worker-1 new logs ==="; kubectl logs -n kube-flannel -l app=flannel --tail=5 2>&1; echo ""; echo "=== DNS from source-controller ==="; kubectl exec -n flux-system deployment/source-controller -- nslookup github.com 2>&1')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'kubectl delete pod -n flux-system -l app=source-controller && kubectl rollout status deployment/source-controller -n flux-system --timeout=60s')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'flux reconcile kustomization infra-controllers --with-source && flux get kustomizations -A')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'flux get kustomizations -A && echo "---" && flux get helmreleases -A')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'kubectl get all -n sealed-secrets && echo "---" && kubectl describe helmrelease sealed-secrets -n sealed-secrets 2>&1')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'kubectl get all -n artifactory && echo "---" && flux get helmreleases -n flux-system')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'flux get helmreleases -A && echo "---" && kubectl get sealedsecret,secret -n artifactory')
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'flux reconcile helmrelease artifactory-oss -n artifactory --timeout=3m')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(r['chart']['metadata']['dependencies'] if 'dependencies' in r['chart']['metadata'] else 'no deps', indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,base64; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':\\n', base64.b64decode\(v\).decode\(\)\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,base64; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,'=',base64.b64decode\(v\).decode\(\)\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(ssh kubeadmin@cakers-cp-1 'cat ~/apps-artifactory-db-credentials.yaml; echo "---"; cat ~/apps-artifactory-join-key.yaml; echo "---"; cat ~/apps-artifactory-master-key.yaml')
